title: IT Storage Engineer
description:
Job Description:

•Responsiblefor corporate-level service delivery projects/development projects, and technical work of IT services in service business scenarios such as complex system integration of product families, system O&M, learning services, and service solution development.

•Responsible to achieve delivery service objectives such as baselines, efficiency, costs, quality, or competitiveness; summarize cases and service requirements; guide and cultivate lower-level employees to improve their capabilities.

•Responsible as a Technical SME position for Huawei enterprise IT products, post-sales support and IT solution reviewing. Take the lead in making technical breakthroughs, technical innovations, locating major issues, etc. for a service product of the IT technology domain.

•Responsible to output replicable success experience for local office/channel partner/key account customers. Through effective architecture design and solution design, improve the service efficiency and business quality of the professional domain, meet the baseline and competitiveness requirements, and ensure the achievement of service operation targets. Lead the technical competitiveness of the professional domain to reach the industry-leading level.

•Require to work as a team with either regional/HQ or local team.

•Require to work under minimum supervision to complete tasks assigned.

•Require to be able to present technical solution professionally and have technical training for local channel partners and customers.

Job Requirements:

•Minimum a Bachelor Degree in computer science/engineering/telecommunication with distinction.

•Minimum 3 years of working experience for IT storage designing, migration, delivery and maintenance (Proficient in x86 server, SAN/NAS Storage, Virtualization (VMWare), windows series operation system, linux/unix system).

•Preference for experience in handling Huawei System for example DeviceManager, Smartkit, FusionCompute and others.

•Required skills: IT technology such as x86 server architecture, SAN/NAS storage architecture, data protect, DC disaster recovery (HyperMetro), data migration.

•Internal and external communication and influence: able to communicate with the corresponding level of customers, and influence decision-making.

•Self-initiative to take the responsibility of task and learn new products/technologies

•The candidate shall be adaptable and flexible to tasks or job scope being assigned.

•Proficiency in Mandarin, both written and verbal to liaise with mandarin speaking associates

Next Step

Click “apply” or send resume to: Ryce Ryce.Fan@adecco.com

EA Licence No.91C2918| Personnel Registration No. R23117258

postedCompany.description:
The Adecco Group is the world's leading provider of HR solutions. With over 35,000 FTE employees and over 5,200 branches, in over 60 countries and territories around the world, we offer a wide variety of services, connecting more than 650,000 associates with over 100,000 clients every day.

The services we offer fall into the broad categories of temporary staffing, permanent placement, career transition and talent development, as well as outsourcing and consulting. The Adecco Group is based in Zurich-Glattbrugg, Switzerland and we are a Fortune Global 500 company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
postedCompany.name: ADECCO PERSONNEL PTE LTD
